name: Hunter Memory System
description: Custom local memory system with zero API costs. Hybrid semantic + keyword search using local embeddings (sentence-transformers) and SQLite vector storage.
author: Hunter (Ben Foxx)

serverUrl.label: Memory Server URL
serverUrl.description: HTTP endpoint for the memory system server

maxResults.label: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of search results to return

semanticWeight.label: Semantic Weight
semanticWeight.description: Weight for semantic similarity in hybrid search (0-1)

keywordWeight.label: Keyword Weight
keywordWeight.description: Weight for keyword matching in hybrid search (0-1)
